name: ICHOR HOLDINGS, LTD.
business: Ichor designs, engineers, and manufactures critical fluid delivery subsystems and components primarily for semiconductor capital equipment, as well as for defense/aerospace and medical industries. Its primary products include gas and chemical delivery subsystems used in semiconductor manufacturing processes such as etch and deposition.

exposures.sentence: We are a leader in the design, engineering and manufacturing of critical fluid delivery subsystems and components primarily for semiconductor capital equipment, as well as other industries such as defense/aerospace and medical.
We support a number of aerospace and defense related customers with advanced, high-precision manufacturing services.

The welded assemblies are used in both wet and dry processes, as well as non-semiconductor applications including in the aerospace, commercial space, defense, medical device, and general industrial markets.

catalysts.sentence: Income tax expense consists primarily of taxes on our taxable income related to our domestic and foreign operations, offset by the benefit of our tax holiday in Singapore, which expires in 2026.
the USMCA undergoes its scheduled joint review in July 2026.
